history.details: Medium mission — centralize workflow stage definitions and user guidance
Vision reviewed and accepted — advancing to requirements
Requirements reviewed and accepted — R1-R6 covering registry, agent decoupling, templates, workflow simplification, backwards compat, testing
Architecture reviewed and accepted — stage-registry.jsonc as single source of truth, agent decoupling via registry lookup, user guidance templates
3 phases, 3 task files, 9 tasks — all sonnet tier. Phase 1: registry+templates, Phase 2: agent decoupling, Phase 3: workflow simplification+tests
All 3 phases complete, 9/9 tasks done, 4 commits. 211 tests pass (11 new). Net reduction of ~170 lines across agents and workflows.
All 18 requirements (R1-R6) verified. 211 tests pass, typecheck clean. All commands remain functional.
